strengths: 15+ years full-stack engineering across distributed systems, microservices, and event-driven architectures with proven low-latency optimization at scale
Current hands-on work with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP framework development at re:cinq
Polyglot technical depth across multiple domains (backend, frontend, infrastructure, DevOps) enabling cross-domain problem-solving
concerns: No demonstrated production experience building or operating multi-agent AI systems at scale beyond framework-level infrastructure work
Zero fintech-domain expertise; no background in credit systems, payment flows, working-capital management, or regulated financial operations
No evidence of executive technical leadership or scaling engineering teams to 30+ people; resume emphasizes individual technical contributions

key_factors.factor: Fintech domain and regulated-environment operations expertise
Multi-agent AI systems production architecture and scaling
Technical leadership and engineering team scaling track record

response.justification: Strong foundational technical skills in distributed systems and real-time infrastructure, with recent exposure to agentic AI frameworks. However, multiple hard-requirement gaps exist: no fintech-domain knowledge or experience operating in regulated financial environments; no demonstrated production experience building or scaling multi-agent AI systems beyond infrastructure work; and no evidence of executive-level technical leadership or successfully scaling engineering organizations. While technical depth is valuable, these three gaps represent critical risk for a CTO role in AI-driven fintech.
